name: Recombinant Protein Expression in E. coli
nameCn: 大肠杆菌重组蛋白表达

note.en: Heat shock (heat_shock_transformation): 42°C 30 s → 2 min ice → 200 µL SOC → 37°C 45 min. Plate on LB+antibiotic agar, 37°C overnight.
note.zh: 热激（heat_shock_transformation）：42°C 30 s → 2 min 冰 → 200 µL SOC → 37°C 45 min。涂 LB+抗生素平板，37°C 过夜。

components.name: 2. Inoculate starter culture: 5–10 mL LB+antibiotic, 37°C, 200 rpm, overnight
3. Dilute 1:50–1:100 into expression medium (LB or TB), shake 37°C 200 rpm

note.en: 10 mL starter into 500 mL TB (tb_media) in 2 L flask. TB gives ~2× higher cell density than LB.
note.zh: 10 mL 过夜培养物加入 500 mL TB（tb_media），2 L 摇瓶。TB 培养密度比 LB 高 ~2 倍。

components.name: 4. Monitor OD₆₀₀; at OD 0.6–0.8 cool to induction temperature

note.en: Soluble: cool to 18°C (~15 min ice-water bath). High yield/inclusion body: stay at 37°C.
note.zh: 可溶表达：降温至 18°C（~15 min 冰水浴）。高产量/包涵体：保持 37°C。

note.en: Soluble: 0.1–0.5 mM, 18°C, 16–20 h overnight. Inclusion body: 1 mM, 37°C, 3–4 h. Test conditions for new proteins!
note.zh: 可溶：0.1–0.5 mM IPTG，18°C，16–20 h 过夜。包涵体：1 mM IPTG，37°C，3–4 h。新蛋白务必先做条件摸索！

note.en: Discard supernatant. Pellets storable at −80°C (weeks–months). Weigh pellet.
note.zh: 弃上清。菌体沉淀可 −80°C 保存数周至数月。称量湿重。

components.name: 7. Check expression: SDS-PAGE on pre/post-induction samples

note.en: Take 1 mL at OD 0.6 (T=0) and post-induction. Pellet → SDS buffer → boil 5 min. Expect new band at target MW.
note.zh: 分别取 OD 0.6 时（T=0）和诱导后各 1 mL。离心收菌 → SDS 上样缓冲液 → 煮 5 min。应见目标 MW 新带。

components.name: 8. Solubility check: lyse aliquot → 20,000×g 10 min 4°C → SDS-PAGE pellet vs supernatant

note.en: Protein in pellet = inclusion body. Try: lower temp (16°C), less IPTG (0.05 mM), co-express chaperones (GroEL/ES, DnaK), or different strains (Rosetta, SoluBL21, ArcticExpress).
note.zh: 蛋白在沉淀 = 包涵体。试：更低温度（16°C）、更少 IPTG（0.05 mM）、共表达分子伴侣（GroEL/ES、DnaK）、或换菌株（Rosetta、SoluBL21、ArcticExpress）。

notes.en: Troubleshooting: Low expression → verify plasmid, antibiotic. Insoluble → lower temp, auto-induction (ZYM-5052), solubility tags (MBP, SUMO, NusA). Proteolysis → protease inhibitors, BL21 strain. Codon optimization for eukaryotic genes.
notes.zh: 排查：表达低→检查质粒、抗生素；包涵体→降温、自诱导培养基（ZYM-5052）、可溶性标签（MBP、SUMO、NusA）；降解→加蛋白酶抑制剂、用 BL21 菌株。真核基因注意密码子优化。

ref: Rosano & Ceccarelli (2014) Front Microbiol 5:172; Studier (2005) Protein Expr Purif 41:207–234; Graslund et al. (2008) Nat Methods 5:135–146

materials.name: Expression plasmid (pET, pGEX, etc.) in BL21(DE3) or similar

usage.en: Express recombinant proteins in E. coli using IPTG induction.
usage.zh: 通过 IPTG 诱导在大肠杆菌中表达重组蛋白。

briefSteps.en: Transform plasmid into BL21(DE3) → overnight starter culture → dilute 1:50–1:100 into expression medium → grow to OD₆₀₀ 0.6–0.8 → cool to induction temp → add 0.1–1 mM IPTG → induce 3–20 h → harvest cells → check expression by SDS-PAGE
briefSteps.zh: 质粒转入 BL21(DE3) → 过夜种子培养 → 1:50–1:100 接种表达培养基 → 培养至 OD₆₀₀ 0.6–0.8 → 降温 → 加 0.1–1 mM IPTG → 诱导 3–20 h → 收集菌体 → SDS-PAGE 检测表达

detailedSteps.en: Day 1: Transform the expression vector into BL21(DE3) by heat shock (42°C, 30 s). Plate on LB + antibiotic agar and grow at 37°C overnight.
detailedSteps.zh: 第1天：热激（42°C、30 s）将表达载体转入 BL21(DE3），涂 LB + 抗生素平板，37°C 过夜培养。

detailedSteps.en: Day 2: Pick a single colony into 5–10 mL LB + antibiotic; grow overnight at 37°C, 200 rpm (12–16 h) as a starter culture.
detailedSteps.zh: 第2天：挑单克隆接种至 5–10 mL LB + 抗生素，37°C、200 rpm 过夜培养 12–16 h 作为种子液。

detailedSteps.en: Day 3: Dilute starter culture 1:50–1:100 into 500 mL LB or TB medium in a 2 L baffled flask; shake at 37°C, 200 rpm.
detailedSteps.zh: 第3天：将种子液 1:50–1:100 接种至 2 L 挡板摇瓶中的 500 mL LB 或 TB 培养基，37°C、200 rpm 振荡培养。

detailedSteps.en: Monitor OD₆₀₀ every 30 min; when OD reaches 0.6–0.8 (approximately 2–3 h), take a 1 mL pre-induction sample and pellet for SDS-PAGE.
detailedSteps.zh: 每 30 min 监测 OD₆₀₀，当 OD 达 0.6–0.8（约 2–3 h 后），取 1 mL 诱导前样品离心备 SDS-PAGE 检测。

detailedSteps.en: For soluble expression: cool culture to 16–18°C by transferring to an ice-water bath (~15 min) or cold incubator. For inclusion body/high-yield: remain at 37°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 可溶表达：将培养物转至冰水浴（约 15 min）或冷培养箱降温至 16–18°C；包涵体/高产量：保持 37°C。

detailedSteps.en: Induce expression by adding IPTG from a 1 M stock: 0.1–0.5 mM for soluble expression at 16–18°C (16–20 h overnight); 0.5–1 mM for high-yield/inclusion body at 37°C (3–4 h).
detailedSteps.zh: 从 1 M IPTG 储液中加入诱导：可溶表达 0.1–0.5 mM，16–18°C 诱导 16–20 h（过夜）；高产量/包涵体 0.5–1 mM，37°C 诱导 3–4 h。

detailedSteps.en: At the end of induction, take a 1 mL post-induction sample for SDS-PAGE comparison. Harvest cells by centrifugation at 5,000×g for 10 min at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 诱导结束时取 1 mL 诱导后样品用于 SDS-PAGE 对比，4°C、5,000×g 离心 10 min 收集菌体。

detailedSteps.en: Discard supernatant; weigh the wet cell pellet. Pellets can be stored at −80°C for weeks to months.
detailedSteps.zh: 弃去上清，称量菌体湿重。菌体沉淀可 −80°C 保存数周至数月。

detailedSteps.en: Check expression: resuspend pre- and post-induction samples in SDS loading buffer, boil at 95°C for 5 min, run SDS-PAGE. A new band at the target molecular weight confirms expression.
detailedSteps.zh: 检查表达：将诱导前后样品用 SDS 上样缓冲液重悬，95°C 煮 5 min，跑 SDS-PAGE，出现目标分子量新条带即确认表达。

detailedSteps.en: Optional solubility check: lyse a small aliquot (sonication or lysozyme), centrifuge at 20,000×g for 10 min at 4°C, run SDS-PAGE on pellet vs. supernatant to determine if protein is soluble.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选溶解性检测：取少量菌体裂解（超声或溶菌酶法），4°C、20,000×g 离心 10 min，分别取沉淀和上清跑 SDS-PAGE，判断蛋白是否可溶。

detailedSteps.en: Proceed to protein purification by affinity chromatography (His-tag: Ni-NTA resin; GST-tag: glutathione resin). See his_tag_purification or gst_tag_purification protocols.
detailedSteps.zh: 进行亲和层析纯化蛋白（His 标签：Ni-NTA 树脂；GST 标签：谷胱甘肽树脂），参见 his_tag_purification 或 gst_tag_purification 方案。

note.en: Transformed colonies on plates can be stored at 4°C (sealed) for up to 1 week before continuing.
note.zh: 转化平板上的菌落密封后可 4°C 保存最多 1 周后继续。

note.en: Harvested cell pellets can be snap-frozen and stored at −80°C for up to 6 months before lysis and purification.
note.zh: 收集的菌体沉淀可速冻后 −80°C 保存最多 6 个月，再进行裂解和纯化。
